problem_statement: The paper addresses how to systematically assess and manage the risks of AI-generated content and code in web application development, since AI outputs are not infallible and require oversight to ensure quality, security, and compliance.
insufficiency_evidence: AI code generators "often overlook critical syntactic details, propose incorrect or inefficient implementations, and may rely on outdated or incompatible libraries"; "AI-generated code cannot be considered ready for immediate use and requires careful review, testing, and optimization by a qualified developer."
key_constructs: conceptual framework for AI-based tools in web development
governance_refs: AI-TMM (AI Trust Framework and Maturity Model)
